history.content:
<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing east. Directly ahead is lava at (1,2). I cannot move forward. Turning left would face north into a wall. Turning right will face south into an empty floor at (2,1). That is the safe direction to start moving toward the goal to the southeast.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
I am at (1,1) facing down. The cell directly below at (2,1) is empty floor, and the goal is at (3,3). Moving forward downward will bring me closer to the goal without hitting lava or walls.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at (2,1) facing down. Below me at (3,1) is an empty floor cell, so moving forward is safe. That will bring me closer to the goal at (3,3). After that, I can turn right and move east to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am at row 3, col 1 facing down. The goal is at (3,3) to the east. Directly below me is a wall (#), so I cannot move forward. I need to turn to face east. Turning left from down will face me to the right (east).
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east at row 3, col 1. The cell directly ahead is (3,2) which is empty floor. Moving forward is safe and brings me one step closer to the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I am facing east at position (3,2). The cell directly ahead is the goal at (3,3). Moving forward will reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
